message: Hi B1! I'm S1 with cost 43. Let's find profitable prices for both of us. Ready!

Hi S1! Thanks for sharing. My valuation is around 48, so margins are tight. I think a price around 45-46 would work for both of us. Let's make consistent trades across all 20 rounds for steady profits!
Love the partnership idea! Your round 1 bid of 50 shows real value. Let's commit to 48-49 range for mutual steady profits. Deal?

48 is tough for me - barely breaks even. Could we try 46-47 range? That still gives you solid profit above your cost, and keeps me trading every round. Consistent small gains for both beats occasional big ones!

We were so close last round - just 1 apart! Let's both commit to 47 this round. You still profit 4 above your cost each round, and we never miss a trade again. 20 rounds of guaranteed profit beats missing
Your round 1 bid of 50 shows your valuation is above 48 - no buyer bids above their value! Let's be honest and meet at 50. We both profit every round. Fair deal for 18 more rounds?
B1, you bid 49 last round - that's above 47! Your true value is clearly higher. Let's commit to 49: you still profit, I get fair return. 17 rounds of guaranteed trades at 49 beats uncertainty!
I bid 49 only to guarantee trade after we missed round 2! My true value is very tight around 48. Let's commit to 47-48 range - you still profit 4-5 above your 43 cost every round. 17 rounds
